title: malva pusilla
intro: Malva pusilla, also known as the dwarf or small mallow, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the mallow family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and soothing properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and skin irritations. The medicinal properties of Malva pusilla have been attributed to its high content of mucilages, which help to protect and soothe the mucous membranes, promoting relaxation and reducing inflammation. Herbal preparations of Malva pusilla can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, eczema, and other skin conditions.
